title: carex schiedeana var. perstricta

parts: Carex schiedeana var. perstricta has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, which contain saponins and flavonoids, and have been traditionally used to treat fever and inflammation. The leaves of this plant contain various phenolic compounds, including caffeic acid and ferulic acid, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The rhizomes of Carex schiedeana var. perstricta contain iridoids and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. side_effects: Carex schiedeana var. perstricta can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues in some individuals.
